items.title: Apple’s foldable iPhone could be just around the corner
items.summary: The iOS 27 developer beta includes code that references the fold state and screen angle of a device.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.summary: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
